adapter_candidate.module_tree:
DenseDecoder(
  (token_embedding): Embedding(257, 528)
  (position_embedding): Embedding(128, 528)
  (blocks): ModuleList(
    (0-2): 3 x TransformerEncoderLayer(
      (self_attn): MultiheadAttention(
        (out_proj): NonDynamicallyQuantizableLinear(in_features=528, out_features=528, bias=True)
      )
      (linear1): Linear(in_features=528, out_features=2112, bias=True)
      (dropout): Dropout(p=0.0, inplace=False)
      (linear2): Linear(in_features=2112, out_features=528, bias=True)
      (norm1): LayerNorm((528,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True, bias=True)
      (norm2): LayerNorm((528,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True, bias=True)
      (dropout1): Dropout(p=0.0, inplace=False)
      (dropout2): Dropout(p=0.0, inplace=False)
    )
  )
  (adapters): ModuleList(
    (0-2): 3 x _ResidualAdapter(
      (norm): LayerNorm((528,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True, bias=True)
      (down): Linear(in_features=528, out_features=64, bias=True)
      (up): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=528, bias=True)
      (activation): GELU(approximate='none')
    )
  )
  (norm): LayerNorm((528,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True, bias=True)
  (head): Linear(in_features=528, out_features=257, bias=True)
)

dense_11m.module_tree:
DenseDecoder(
  (token_embedding): Embedding(257, 544)
  (position_embedding): Embedding(128, 544)
  (blocks): ModuleList(
    (0-2): 3 x TransformerEncoderLayer(
      (self_attn): MultiheadAttention(
        (out_proj): NonDynamicallyQuantizableLinear(in_features=544, out_features=544, bias=True)
      )
      (linear1): Linear(in_features=544, out_features=2176, bias=True)
      (dropout): Dropout(p=0.0, inplace=False)
      (linear2): Linear(in_features=2176, out_features=544, bias=True)
      (norm1): LayerNorm((544,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True, bias=True)
      (norm2): LayerNorm((544,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True, bias=True)
      (dropout1): Dropout(p=0.0, inplace=False)
      (dropout2): Dropout(p=0.0, inplace=False)
    )
  )
  (adapters): ModuleList(
    (0-2): 3 x Identity()
  )
  (norm): LayerNorm((544,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True, bias=True)
  (head): Linear(in_features=544, out_features=257, bias=True)
)

architecture.routing_or_residual_expert_candidate: No routed/residual-expert trained model exists in the current dense-training path. Earlier routing work is proxy/synthetic and not a trained decoder candidate.

claims_to_sources.claim: D4 is exploratory-research-only and exceeds 50M train tokens.
T6 is the completed 11M dense 50M-token SGD/FP32 baseline.
T7a adapter candidate failed at step_2_gradients.
T7c identity-initialized adapter trains 2.56M tokens but underperforms dense AdamW.
T8g and T8h are exactly identical in loss, validation, sample, and checkpoint size.
Three-step fixed-batch diagnostic proves BF16-requested and FP32 paths are identical under current masked-block fallback.
Experiment records now include dirty-worktree metadata for future runs.

datasets_loader_policy.load_dataset_template: load_dataset('parquet', data_files={'train': parquet_urls}, split='train', streaming=True, cache_dir='data/hf_cache')
datasets_loader_policy.remote_dataset_script_policy: do not execute dataset repository scripts; use Dataset Viewer converted parquet URLs pinned by dataset revision metadata

filter_policy.binary_rejection: reject rows containing NUL bytes or decode failures
filter_policy.license_metadata_policy: record stated license/config metadata and restrictions; do not reject normally accessible rows solely for mixed, other, unknown, gated, or unsuitable-for-production license metadata during this exploratory phase
filter_policy.split_policy: repository-aware hash split by repo name before file-level shuffling
filter_policy.strict_policy_deferred: later production/company deployment pass must apply strict legal and company-policy filters before any redistribution or deployment

sources.card_review: HF card reports MIT license and public GitHub BigQuery provenance. Dataset configs include language and license partitions. This exploratory manifest intentionally includes mixed-license metadata where normally accessible, and records it as not approved for production or redistribution. Preview shows vendored paths such as node_modules, so streaming materialization must apply vendor/generated/secret filters.

HF card reports Apache-2.0 for the cleaned GitHub-code dataset. Dataset configs include language and license partitions. This exploratory manifest records stated license metadata and restrictions, while deferring strict legal/company-policy filtering to a later production approval pass.

token_count.method: will count byte-tokenizer tokens during streamed mirror build

transformations: extract text/repo/path/language/license columns from Dataset Viewer parquet rows
assign repository-aware train/validation/test split by stable repo hash
count byte-tokenizer tokens as utf8 bytes plus eos
write jsonl rows with source dataset/config/revision and row checksums

sampling.packing: All accepted JSONL texts are concatenated as byte-token IDs with EOS after each document. Each batch samples random contiguous seq_len+1 windows from the concatenated tensor.
sampling.reason: There is no split-aware sampler in train_dense_decoder; the D4 JSONL rows include split metadata, but load_jsonl_texts currently loads all text rows for training and validation sampling.
sampling.train_sampling: torch.randint over start offsets with a CPU torch.Generator seeded from --seed. Sampling is with replacement; no epoch boundaries or wraparound logic.
sampling.validation_sampling: After training, the same CPU generator state samples validation_batches random windows from the same concatenated corpus. Current records now include validation.sample_order_sha256 for new runs.

tokenizer.description: UTF-8 bytes plus EOS token 256; no BPE, no learned vocab file.

hardware_software.rocminfo_excerpt: unavailable: CalledProcessError: Command '['rocminfo']' returned non-zero exit status 1.

known_limitations: T7b/T7c/T8h/T8i were generated before dirty-worktree metadata existed; their git_commit fields point at the previous committed snapshot even though current source edits were present.
T8g was generated before validation.sample_order_sha256 existed; T8h has the validation sample-order fingerprint for the matching FP32 control.
Current training uses all loaded D4 JSONL texts for both training and validation sampling; D4 row split metadata is not enforced by train_dense_decoder.
BF16-requested path is effectively FP32 for meaningful masked transformer computation under the current fallback.

operation_dtype_limitations: PyTorch TransformerEncoderLayer/MultiheadAttention does not expose attention score or softmax tensors via public forward hooks.
Q/K/V projection dtypes are represented by MultiheadAttention input/output and parameter dtypes; individual internal Q/K/V tensors are not directly captured.
The causal mask is created as torch.float32 additive -inf mask before entering the block.

T6.command: uv run python scripts/train_dense_decoder.py --corpus-jsonl data/hf_mirror/exploratory_d3/corpus.jsonl --corpus-record results/D4_hf_corpus_materialization.json  --device rocm --seq-len 128 --hidden-dim 544 --layers 3 --heads 8 --batch-size 2 --steps 195313 --validation-batches 8 --gradient-accumulation-steps 1 --max-file-bytes 256000 --mixed-precision fp32 --output-dir artifacts/dense_decoder_11m_hf_d4_50m_tokens --progress-interval 2500 --checkpoint-interval 5000 --output results/T6_rocm_dense_decoder_11m_hf_d4_50m_tokens.json
T6.notes: Initial configurable dense decoder training smoke from random initialization on the filtered local repository corpus. This validates the pipeline only; it is not the required 10-50M parameter or 50M-token run.

T7a.command: uv run python <inline debug_dense_step_stability adapter candidate>
T7a.notes: Two-step ROCm finite-state debug for the matched adapter decoder candidate on the D4 HF mirror.

T7b.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run python <inline debug_dense_step_stability identity adapter>
T7b.notes: Two-step ROCm finite-state debug for the 10.6M adapter candidate after changing residual adapters to identity initialization. Uses the same D4 HF mirror, tokenizer, and additive mask.
